ZONECOMBAT.Settings.FillAlphaHint: How solid the zone fills are. Lower = more of the map shows through. 0 hides the fills entirely (rings still outlined).
ZONECOMBAT.Settings.BoundaryWidthHint: Thickness (px) of the bold lines drawn between zones and around the outer edge.
ZONECOMBAT.Settings.BoundaryColorHint: Color of the bold lines drawn between zones and around the outer edge.
ZONECOMBAT.Settings.UnitHint: Measure band distances in feet (scene units) or grid spaces. Thresholds use this unit.
ZONECOMBAT.Settings.ApplyLayout: Arrange tokens into the zone map
ZONECOMBAT.Settings.ApplyLayoutHint: When a turn begins, move the active token to the scene-center zone map and arrange the others into their rings. On by default.
ZONECOMBAT.Settings.LogChangesHint: Whisper a summary of band changes to GMs when a turn ends.
ZONECOMBAT.Settings.ArmReachHint: Distance (grid spaces) counted as Close / engaged in drawn-zone mode, even across an adjacent zone edge.
